overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront district at dusk, transitioning between elevated promenades and lower water-level walkways beneath highway overpasses, featuring neon-lit architecture, digital billboards, and reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade beneath elevated highway

events.description: approaching and descending stairway to lower waterfront level

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade passing benches and digital billboards, then descending stairs to lower level

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the scene with vehicles traveling above
blue metal railing separating the promenade from the water below
illuminated vertical billboard displaying DARRA advertisement with orange and white graphics
futuristic benches with glowing cyan accents along the promenade
tall dark building with horizontal purple neon light strips

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered waterfront promenade beneath a massive highway overpass at dusk. The wet concrete reflects neon lights from nearby buildings and a prominent digital billboard advertising DARRA. The character passes futuristic turquoise benches and sparse pedestrians before approaching a stairway descent.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway beneath highway bridge along water

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow concrete path at water level beneath the highway overpass

entered.detail: narrow concrete walkway at water level with dark wet surface
dark water canal reflecting the overhead bridge and city lights
massive concrete support columns holding up the highway above
tall gray concrete wall on the left side of the path
bright yellow metal railings along the water edge
the underside of the highway bridge with visible structural beams

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow, enclosed waterfront walkway beneath the highway overpass. The space is dimly lit with massive concrete pillars rising from the dark water. Yellow safety railings line the path edge as the character walks along the canal, sheltered from the open sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered stairway ascending from waterfront to promenade

events.description: emerging from stairway back to upper promenade level with sky visible

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairway with red handrails and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs with worn gray steps ascending upward
red painted metal handrails running along both sides of the stairs
wall covered with large red asian character graffiti and other tags
wall with purple and green spray paint graffiti tags
discarded cardboard boxes and trash accumulated on the stair landing
single fluorescent tube light fixture illuminating the stairwell

segments.scene_description: Ascending a narrow concrete stairway enclosed by walls covered in vibrant graffiti including large red asian characters. Red metal handrails line the stairs as the character climbs past discarded cardboard debris toward the light at the top, transitioning from the dark lower level back to the open promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees and digital signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper waterfront promenade passing pedestrians and digital billboards under the highway overpass

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in same direction wearing bright orange clothing

entered.detail: tall digital billboard displaying a man's face with text and green accents
tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade
modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades rising in the distance
tall vertical neon signs and billboards illuminating the distant cityscape
ornate street lamps with multiple lights lining the promenade

segments.scene_description: Back on the upper waterfront promenade, walking beneath the highway overpass toward a more open area with palm trees and dense city architecture. The scene features moderate pedestrian traffic, glowing digital billboards including one with a man's face, and distant glass skyscrapers against the darkening dusk sky. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a cyberpunk waterfront district, descending from a neon-lit promenade into a dim industrial underpass before climbing back toward the city skyline. It begins on a covered promenade beneath a massive highway overpass, where wet concrete reflects the glow of a DARRA digital billboard and turquoise benches. The camera then descends into a narrow, enclosed walkway characterized by massive concrete pillars and yellow safety railings that line a dark canal. As the path shifts, the camera ascends a narrow concrete stairway adorned with vibrant graffiti and red handrails, moving past discarded debris toward the light above. Finally, the scene opens back onto the upper promenade, passing palm trees and glowing billboards of human faces as the view expands toward distant glass skyscrapers against a darkening dusk sky.
